text: I feel a strange curiosity here, almost as if I'm stepping into a laboratory of ideas. The blue neon invites me into a space that celebrates research and experimentation, while the words on the wall encourage me to consider the evolving bond between humans and intelligent machines. There's a playful seriousness to the room—a place for critical thought, but also for wonder. It makes me aware of my own role as both observer and participant in the endless pursuit of knowledge.
